# https://gongeo.us/ llms.txt

- [Home](https://gongeo.us/): Infinity Nikki pull tracker and statistics.
- [Tracker](https://gongeo.us/tracker): Track your personal Infinity Nikki pulls and statistics.
- [Global Stats](https://gongeo.us/global): View global Infinity Nikki pull statistics and trends.
- [Banner List](https://gongeo.us/banners): Timeline and details of all Infinity Nikki resonance banners.
- [Banner Details](https://gongeo.us/banners/1): In-depth statistics and drop rates for each banner (replace 1 with any banner ID).
- [Import](https://gongeo.us/import): Import your Infinity Nikki resonance data from game, file, or Pearpal.
- [FAQ](https://gongeo.us/faq): Frequently asked questions about the tracker, data, and privacy.
- [About](https://gongeo.us/about): Learn about the project, data sources, and privacy practices.
- [Login](https://gongeo.us/login): Sign in or register to sync and manage your pull data.
- [Sitemap](https://gongeo.us/sitemap.xml): Explore all public pages and banner routes for easy navigation.
